commands.name: generate

options.name: --ts-output
options.description: The output directory for generated TypeScript files

arguments.name: DIRECTORY
arguments.description: The directory path to scan for C# files

commands.description: Generate TypeScript definitions from C# files (one-time)

commands.name: watch

options.name: --delay
options.description:
Debounce delay in milliseconds before processing 
changes

options.name: --ts-output
options.description: The output directory for generated TypeScript files

arguments.name: DIRECTORY
arguments.description: The directory path to watch for C# file changes

commands.description:
Watch directory for changes and regenerate TypeScript 
definitions automatically
